pricing_recommendations.rationale: Investment newsletters command premium pricing. Financial content subscribers pay 2-3x more than general newsletters. Free tier builds audience; premium tier offers daily signals, portfolio updates, and exclusive research.

implementation.phase_3: Introduce €49/month premium tier with portfolio tracking

pricing_recommendations.rationale: Gumroad AI tools sell for $10-200. Your scripts have proven value (Mission Control dashboard, X automation). One-time pricing reduces friction; subscription provides recurring revenue.
Notion templates are a $100M+ market. Finance/investment templates command premium pricing. Low overhead, high margin, passive income.
AI consulting rates range from €300-2,000/day depending on expertise. Your demonstrated skills (browser automation, dashboard creation, research systems) justify premium positioning.
Your dashboard has enterprise-grade features. Comparable tools charge $10-50/month. Multi-tenant version could serve multiple users.
Your X automation system is proven. Many creators/businesses want social media automation but lack technical skills. Managed service commands premium.

experiments.name: Newsletter Price Anchor Test
experiments.description: Test €15 vs €25 vs €35/month pricing for premium newsletter
experiments.hypothesis: €25/month will maximize revenue while maintaining good conversion

experiments.name: Annual Discount Sweet Spot
experiments.hypothesis: 20% discount (2 months free) is the sweet spot

experiments.name: Digital Product Bundle Test
experiments.description: Test individual sales vs bundled pricing for Notion templates
experiments.metric: Average order value and total sales

experiments.name: Freemium Conversion Funnel
experiments.description: Track free-to-paid conversion at different free content volumes

experiments.name: Consulting Discovery Call
experiments.description: Offer free 30-min discovery calls to test consulting demand
experiments.metric: Calls booked and conversion to paid projects

pricing_insights.insight: Newsletter platform fees eat 10-20% of revenue
pricing_insights.detail: Substack takes 10%, Beehiiv takes 0% on Scale plan ($43/month), ConvertKit takes 3.5% + 30¢ per transaction
pricing_insights.recommendation: Use Beehiiv for 0% transaction fees on paid subscriptions

pricing_insights.insight: Annual pricing improves cash flow and retention
pricing_insights.detail: Annual subscribers have 40-60% lower churn. Upfront cash enables reinvestment.
AI-powered products sell for 2-5x non-AI equivalents. Your automation expertise is valuable.
pricing_insights.recommendation: Price AI products at premium end of market

pricing_insights.insight: Digital products have near-zero marginal cost
pricing_insights.detail: Once created, each additional sale is pure profit. Gumroad takes 10% + processing fees.
pricing_insights.recommendation: Prioritize digital product creation for passive income

pricing_insights.insight: Consulting day rates vary 5x by positioning
pricing_insights.detail: Same skills positioned as 'freelancer' = €300/day, as 'AI consultant' = €1,500/day
pricing_insights.recommendation: Position as 'AI Systems Consultant' not 'freelance developer'

pricing_insights.detail: Expect 2-5% of free users to convert to paid. Need 1,000+ free subscribers for meaningful revenue.
pricing_insights.recommendation: Focus on audience growth before monetization

pricing_insights.detail: Stripe takes 1.5% + €0.25 (EU cards), PayPal 2.9% + €0.30. Factor into pricing.
pricing_insights.recommendation: Add 5% buffer to all prices to cover processing

pricing_insights.detail: EU customers experience 2-3% FX fees on USD purchases. EUR pricing reduces friction.
pricing_insights.recommendation: Price in EUR for EU audience, USD for global

platform_costs.beehiiv_scale: $43/month (€39) - includes 0% transaction fees on paid subs

next_steps: 1. Set up Beehiiv account and import subscriber list
2. Create Gumroad account and upload first digital product
4. Build 3 Notion templates for initial product line
5. Create consulting landing page with Calendly booking
7. Set up analytics to track conversion funnels
8. Launch price anchor tests within 30 days
